q: What do you do when your things are not returned?
examiner_note: Với chủ đề '34. Borrowing and lending things', hãy chú ý đến cấu trúc bài nói. Đảm bảo bạn trả lời đầy đủ các ý trong câu hỏi và sử dụng từ vựng phong phú.

samples.band7: Well, regarding 34. borrowing and lending things, I would say that it's quite an interesting subject. Personally, I think that what do you do when your things are not returned? is something many people find relevant. For instance, when I was younger, I used to think differently, but now I realize its importance.
samples.band8: That's a compelling topic to discuss. To be perfectly honest, 34. borrowing and lending things has always been something I've found quite fascinating. From a broader perspective, what do you do when your things are not returned? allows us to understand the underlying motivations behind our actions. I'm of the opinion that a more sophisticated approach is needed.
samples.band9: Indubitably, the intricacies of 34. borrowing and lending things offer a wealth of analytical possibilities. It is not merely a superficial phenomenon but rather a deep-seated reflection of our cultural values. If we delve into the nuances of what do you do when your things are not returned?, we can discern a clear paradigm shift in how we perceive this issue.
